base_url.description: XKCD API base URL. Defaults to https://xkcd.com when unset (legacy xkcd.go's defaultBaseURL).

comic_number.description: Specific comic number to read for the 'comic' stream (required for that stream only). Interpolated into the request path as a single, urlencoded path segment; a value containing a path-traversal or separator character (e.g. '..', '/', '?', '#') is rejected outright, matching legacy's own comic_number guard (xkcd.go:83-87).
